business_problem: Henkel—founded 1876, operating worldwide in Adhesive Technologies, Beauty Care, and Laundry & Home Care—wanted to expand in the Chinese market but its traditional analytics methods could not deliver multi-dimensional, multi-perspective insights. It needed a high-performance platform with regional market expertise to enable its digital transformation.
solution_summary: Henkel accelerated digital transformation in the Chinese market by consolidating multi-channel analytics into Dataphin's unified data platform, replacing siloed traditional analytics with real-time omnichannel insights. The solution ingests sales, marketing campaign performance, customer interaction data from online and offline channels into a standardized data model, enabling multi-dimensional analysis of consumer behavior and campaign effectiveness. Quick BI provides intuitive dashboards empowering business teams to optimize strategies in real-time. The platform establishes automated marketing foundations, benefiting from machine learning-driven personalization as digital asset accumulation grows.
business_outcome: Henkel consolidated disparate modules into a unified system, performed multi-dimensional analysis of sales and marketing, gauged marketing campaign effectiveness across online and offline channels in real time, and established an automated marketing system that will benefit from future machine learning through digital asset accumulation.
metrics: Three core business areas: Adhesive Technologies, Beauty Care, Laundry & Home Care
architecture_clues: Dataphin as unified PaaS data platform (OneData/OneID/OneService)
Quick BI for business intelligence on top of Dataphin
evidence_quotes: Henkel migrated various applications to the Alibaba Cloud to drive its digital transformation efforts in China. Alibaba Cloud's digital solution enabled Henkel to consolidate different modules into a unified system.
Alibaba Cloud's Dataphin and Quick BI were vital in providing a powerful yet easy-to-use data platform for Henkel's team to optimize its strategy and operations.
The adoption of Alibaba Cloud's digital solution has accelerated our digital transformation progress.

solution_components.name: Dataphin
solution_components.role: Unified data mid-end platform consolidating omnichannel data and enabling standardized analytics

solution_components.name: Quick BI
solution_components.role: Self-service BI and data visualization enabling business teams to perform multi-dimensional analysis

data_flow: Omnichannel sales and marketing data (online/offline) → Dataphin consolidation → Quick BI dashboards → business insights and marketing campaign optimization
